description: Letter from Moshe Castro, in Jerusalem, to Avraham Ibn Shānjī, in Fustat/Cairo. Written in Hebrew. Dating: 1513/14 CE, based on the assessment of Avraham David. The writer requests for donations for the benefit of the Jerusalem community such as for building expenses (ll.21–31) and for needy individuals (ll.4–9). Mentions an "azul" (blue) garment. Information from FGP.
tags: Ladino words, Late Heb, Castro, 16th c
description_he: מכתב בעברית מירושלים לקהיר. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
